basics.name: Islam Hamama
basics.summary: Researcher at NRIAG, Egypt. 12+ years in seismic & infrasound data processing, 5 years in atmospheric infrasound numerical modeling. Ph.D. from Kochi University of Technology, Japan.

work.company: National Center for Physical Acoustics, University of Mississippi
work.summary: Postdoctoral research in infrasound monitoring and source characterization.

work.company: School of Systems Engineering, Kochi University of Technology
work.summary: Postdoctoral research in infrasound propagation modeling and meteor observation.
Research in infrasound and seismoacoustic monitoring, IMS data analysis.

references.name: Prof. Masa-yuki Yamamoto
references.reference: PhD advisor, Kochi University of Technology, Japan. Email: yamamoto.masa-yuki@kochi-tech.ac.jp

references.name: Dr. Eleanor K. Sansom
references.reference: Senior Research Fellow, Curtin University; Director of Global Fireball Observatory. Email: Eleanor.sansom@curtin.edu.au

references.name: Prof. Roger Waxler
references.reference: Principal Scientist, National Center for Physical Acoustics, University of Mississippi. Email: rwax@olemiss.edu
